_meta.source: Seed file — replace by running fetch_trade_data.py

data_sources.name: World Bank Open Data API
data_sources.description: Trade totals (exports, imports of goods and services, current USD)
data_sources.citation: World Bank (2024). World Development Indicators. https://databank.worldbank.org

data_sources.name: UN Comtrade API
data_sources.description: Bilateral trade flows and commodity breakdown by HS chapter (AG2 level)
data_sources.citation: United Nations Statistics Division (2024). UN Comtrade Database. https://comtrade.un.org

_meta.methodology: Trade totals sourced from World Bank API (NE.EXP/IMP.GNFS.CD). Bilateral partner flows and commodity breakdowns sourced from UN Comtrade public API (HS chapter level, AG2 aggregation, reference year 2023). Commodity sections mapped from HS chapters. FTAs and disputes maintained manually.
_meta.arc_note: Trade flow arcs rendered using ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 centroids computed from Natural Earth geometries, not hardcoded coordinates. Projection-safe.
